evals.prompt: I need CAA records for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the caa-checker skill for this caa checker request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects caa-checker for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_check_caa.
Keeps the response focused on checking DNS CAA (Certification Authority Authorization) records to verify CA authorization for certificate issuance.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused caa checker workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the caa-checker skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects caa-checker instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
